fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R1: Security + Syntax: 9 fixes (app.js const→let x3, limiter LRU, security-check throw, code-executor retry, fact content truncation, reviewFact optimistic lock, writeEntities relation limit, gateway pool null-check)
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R2: Security + Robustness: 7 fixes (identity-resolver logger, file-validator magic bytes, session-mapper type guards, generic-executor context truncation+retry+log safety, embedding fallback logging, postJson dedup verified stale)
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R3: Storyline Alignment: 4 fixes (workflow concurrent limit TC-F002-05, gateway binding check AH1-21§21.4.4, generic-executor 7 stage types AH1-01§2.3, workflow org_id persistence AH1-19)
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R4: Doc/Graph Sync: context-graph.json v1.7→1.8, DEV-08 updated, fix-changelog created, source_to_authority mapping added
fix_changelog.2026-05-06-R5: Comprehensive audit fixes: authority_map corrections, layer classification for AH1-13/AH1-27, security-check authority expanded
fix_changelog.2026-05-08-R6: Graph Sync Round 2: DEV-08 version sync (v1.1→v1.8), context-routing.json task_routes naming aligned (M1-M5 prefix convention), authority_map['resource'] corrected from AH1-31→AH1-26 (Provider/Budget L0 authority)
fix_changelog.2026-05-17-R7: Round 5 Comprehensive Audit (25 fixes): [Frontend] const→let for guideTab+toastContainer, showModal ESC listener leak fixed, API error handling added to triggerOrgTask/pauseOrgTask/archiveOrgTask/handleApproval, initApp error boundary, doLogout session invalidation; [Backend] Dream+Task Schedulers refactored to direct fetchFromService calls (was 401-failing HTTP self-calls), /internal/tasks/assign+notify now requireAdmin, setup IP check uses x-forwarded-for+exact matching, setup initialized guard prevents re-init, fetchFromService 30s timeout with AbortError handling; [Infra] litellm main-latest→main-v1.74.4-stable, ADMIN_PASSWORD default added, Redis healthcheck REDISCLI_AUTH, ollama+ollama-pull+ollama_data removed; [Deps] pg unified ^8.20.0 across audit/hermes/web-portal, yaml ^2.4.0→^2.8.3 in shared, drizzle-orm added to hermes-adapter
fix_changelog.2026-05-17-R9: B2B sales storyline and workflow observability loop: rewrote story 21 around boss/manager/sales/admin/ops/dev scenarios; planner now matches private/org/public active workflow skills; gateway supports process-rich completion replies and user confirmation; executor attempts autonomous repair; added smoke:workflow-observability.
fix_changelog.2026-05-18-R10: B2B storyline acceptance and UI smoke: config manager now resolves config/default.yaml from service subdirectories; web portal guide shows 21 stories including B2B sales management daily loop; fact-retrieval tests assert canonical user refs and reject raw channel identity refs; DEV-19 records dependency, test, and UI validation.
fix_changelog.2026-05-18-R11: Full-stack online remediation: Dockerfiles now copy root lockfile plus full workspaces; SigNoz/ClickHouse/Feishu health checks fixed; OTel health extension added; smoke-eval uses SigNoz /api/v1/health, unique users, and longer plan timeout; Web Portal restores CSP-compatible existing interactions, no-caches app.js, and adds workflow/org/quota/inspection proxies verified by Playwright.
